---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

I'm originally from India, where I completed my **B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering** at GITAM University in Visakhapatnam. After graduating in 2025, I moved to Dublin to pursue an **MSc in Business Analytics** at Dublin City University. My work bridges AI research with practical business applications.

## What I've Done

- **Kilkenny Design Practicum**:- Currently working with Kilkenny Design through a university collaboration, applying analytics to real business challenges.
- **AI Intern at Coincent.ai**:- Worked on a Vision Transformer project, learning about image classification and deep learning in practice.
- **Finance Team Lead, University Cricket Club**:- Handled budgets, planned events, and coordinated with sponsors. Not technical, but taught me a lot about teamwork and responsibility.

## Skills

| Area | What I Use |
|---|---|
| Machine Learning | PyTorch, Scikit-Learn, CNNs, Vision Transformers |
| NLP | BERT, LLaMA 3.3, Groq API, Prompt Engineering |
| Data & Analytics | Pandas, NumPy, Plotly, SQL |
| Web & Dev Tools | Python, C, HTML/CSS, Git, Quarto |

: My main technical skills and tools {.striped .hover}

## Where I'm Headed

1. **Right now:** Finish my MSc strong and deliver useful work at the Kilkenny Design practicum.
2. **Longer term:** Work as a data scientist, ideally on projects where AI can genuinely help people — healthcare, sustainability, that sort of thing.
